undetectable.descriptionOn: Natively is currently undetectable by screen-sharing.
undetectable.descriptionOff: Natively is currently detectable by screen-sharing.

mousePassthrough.title: Mouse Passthrough
mousePassthrough.description: Overlay stays visible but lets all mouse clicks pass through to the app beneath.

header.title: General settings
header.subtitle: Customize how Natively works for you

openAtLogin.title: Open Natively when you log in
openAtLogin.description: Natively will open automatically when you log in to your computer

verboseLogging.title: Verbose debug logging
verboseLogging.description: Print detailed audio, STT, and pipeline diagnostics

transcript.title: Interviewer Transcript
transcript.description: Show real-time transcription of the interviewer

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Customize how Natively looks on your device

aiLanguage.title: AI Response Language
aiLanguage.description: Language for AI suggestions and notes

version.title: Version
version.description: You are currently using Natively version {{version}}

opacity.title: Interface Opacity
opacity.description: Controls the visibility of the in-meeting overlay.

disguise.title: Process Disguise
disguise.description: Disguise Natively as another application to prevent detection during screen sharing.
disguise.hint: Select a disguise to be automatically applied when Undetectable mode is on.
disguise.warning: ⚠️ Disable Undetectable mode first to change disguise.
